inputs.label: Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: The volumetric flow rate of the fluid through the pump.

inputs.label: Total Head
inputs.businessContext: The total dynamic head, i.e., the height to which the fluid is pumped.

inputs.label: Fluid Density
inputs.businessContext: The mass density of the fluid. Default value is for water at 20°C.

inputs.label: Pump Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: The hydraulic efficiency of the pump (from manufacturer curve). Enter as percentage.

inputs.label: Motor Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: The efficiency of the electric motor driving the pump. Enter as percentage.
